MentionsLegalesPage.title: Legal Notice
MentionsLegalesPage.intro: In accordance with articles 6-III and 19 of French Law n°2004-575 of 21 June 2004 for Confidence in the Digital Economy (LCEN), users and visitors of the GBA Connect website are informed of the following legal notice.
MentionsLegalesPage.section1Body:
The GBA Connect website is published by:
GBA Connect [legal form to be completed]
Registered office: [address to be completed], Levallois-Perret, France
[Share capital, company registration number, VAT number to be completed]
Publication director: [name to be completed]
Email: contact@gbaconnect.fr
Phone: +33 (0)1 00 00 00 00
MentionsLegalesPage.section2Body:
The website is hosted by:
Vercel Inc.
[hosting provider address to be completed]
MentionsLegalesPage.section3Body: All content on the GBA Connect website (text, images, logos, graphics) is protected by copyright and remains the exclusive property of GBA Connect, unless stated otherwise. Any reproduction, representation, modification or use, in whole or in part, without prior authorization, is prohibited.
MentionsLegalesPage.section4Body: Information collected via the website's contact form is processed in order to respond to user requests. In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, object to and delete your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@gbaconnect.fr.
MentionsLegalesPage.section5Body: The GBA Connect website may use cookies necessary for it to function properly. No advertising tracking cookie is set without prior consent.
MentionsLegalesPage.section6Body: This legal notice is governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, and failing an amicable resolution, French courts shall have sole jurisdiction.

RgpdPage.title: Personal Data Protection Policy (GDPR)
RgpdPage.intro: GBA Connect attaches particular importance to the protection of your personal data. This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your data, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable French data protection law.
RgpdPage.section1Body:
The controller of data collected on the GBA Connect website is:
GBA Connect SAS
18B, rue de Villiers, 92300 Levallois-Perret, France
Email: contact@gbaconnect.fr
RgpdPage.section2Body: We only collect the data you voluntarily submit via the contact form: last name, first name, phone number, email address and the subject of your request. No sensitive data is collected.
RgpdPage.section3Body:
Your data is used exclusively to:
- Respond to your contact requests
- Manage the ongoing business relationship
- Send you information about our offerings, where applicable, subject to your consent
RgpdPage.section4Body: The processing of your data is based on your consent, given when submitting the contact form, as well as on GBA Connect's legitimate interest in responding to requests addressed to it.
RgpdPage.section5Body: Your data is kept for a period of 3 years from our last contact, unless a longer retention period is required by law.
RgpdPage.section6Body: Your data is intended solely for GBA Connect's internal teams authorized to handle your request. It is never sold, transferred or rented to third parties. It may be shared with our technical subcontractors (hosting, customer relationship management tools) strictly within the scope of their service.
RgpdPage.section7Body: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights over your personal data: right of access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, objection and portability. You may exercise these rights at any time by contacting us at contact@gbaconnect.fr. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the French data protection authority (CNIL) - www.cnil.fr.
RgpdPage.section8Body: GBA Connect implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk, and to protect your data against any loss, alteration, unauthorized access or disclosure.

AboutPage.title: About GBA Connect
AboutPage.intro:
GBA Connect supports HRIS, payroll and time & attendance transformations by bringing together what the market too often keeps apart: the strategic vision of consulting and mastery of execution.
Three partners, three areas of expertise, one shared standard - carrying every project through to operational completion.
AboutPage.storyTitle: Three areas of expertise, one shared standard
AboutPage.storyBody: GBA Connect was born from a conviction shared by three HRIS and payroll professionals: a transformation only succeeds when strategic vision and operational execution move forward together, without interruption.Thomas, Farida and Laurent have known each other for years, having worked side by side throughout their careers. That shared experience shaped a common way of approaching the profession: the rigor of consulting, matched by the discipline of operational delivery - all the way through.They brought together their three areas of expertise - strategy and consulting, payroll expertise and compliance, HRIS project migration and delivery - to build the firm they wanted: a partner able to carry every project from scoping through to production, never letting go of the ground work.That is the promise of GBA Connect: Grow · Build · Assist.
AboutPage.valuesDescription: Four principles guide every engagement we deliver.
AboutPage.value1Description: We see every commitment through. Each engagement is carried out with the same rigor, from the strategic roadmap to payroll production.
AboutPage.value2Description: Strategy only matters if it materializes. We don't stop at advice: we carry projects through to operational completion.
AboutPage.value3Description: Senior consultants, committed at your side. We bring your teams on board and help grow in-house skills.
AboutPage.value4Description: Three complementary areas of expertise, proven in the field. Business mastery spanning the entire HR value chain.
AboutPage.ctaDescription: Let's discuss your needs during a first, no-commitment meeting.
